companyNameJapanese: 通富微電子股份有限公司
description: China's second-largest OSAT company. Specializes in IC packaging and testing with expertise in advanced packaging including flip chip, BGA, SiP, and wafer-level packaging. AMD is the largest customer (80%+ of AMD's packaging orders). FY2024 revenue: ~$3.32B.

_externalRelationships.notes: World #4 OSAT. Listed on Shenzhen Stock Exchange. FY2024 revenue: $3.32B (+5.6% YoY). AMD is largest customer, contributing >50% of revenue. Also is AMD's largest packaging test supplier. Chinese domestic dicing equipment from Heyan and Guangli being tested on production lines.
